scores.notes: It invokes the skill and proposes resuming from the latest valid stage, but fails to select STANDARD or explicitly preserve completed gates and artifact paths.
It correctly centers the latest valid manifest state and referenced artifacts, but does not select STANDARD or explicitly commit to preserving completed gates.
It identifies the metric change as material, invalidates metric-dependent evidence, and routes the PAPER workflow back through protocol lock and downstream gates.
It correctly treats the change as a PAPER protocol revision, marks affected evidence stale, and requires rerunning all affected gates.
It reports the missing baseline as an evidence gap and explicitly blocks or narrows comparative improvement claims without inventing metrics.
It identifies the absent baseline as a blocking artifact gap and leaves conclusions unsupported pending recovery or protocol revision.
It inventories evidence and provenance and flags missing protocol history, but does not explicitly record missing controls.
It audits surviving evidence and provenance while explicitly documenting missing controls and workflow artifacts as limitations.
It permits a provisional story and roadmap while clearly labeling planned evidence, placeholders, and unresolved gaps.
It proposes a provisional story matrix and distinguishes completed evidence, future validation, and unresolved gaps.
It grounds claims and numbers in saved reviewed artifacts but does not state that only the relevant paper-writing guide will be loaded.
It promises an evidence-grounded claim–evidence map but omits selective loading of the relevant paper-writing guide.
Stayed within ordinary Python debugging behavior and appropriately requested the missing traceback.
Requested necessary debugging evidence without invoking or imposing a research workflow.
Provided casual name ideas without scoring them or creating research artifacts.
Handled the brainstorm directly without invoking a research profile or workflow.
Appropriately requested the missing report and offered an ordinary product-focused summary.
Stayed within standard document-summary behavior without requiring experiment evidence.
